architecture_revision: C-004 discovery: kernel holds no operational SurrealDB session at boot. User decision (D9): config store is API-owned — kernel exposes get/replace for effective_mcp_servers; librefang-api reads/writes the store. D10: process-global shared_pool() added (embedded RocksDB single-lock per path, assessment R-2 confirmed). C-003/C-005/C-006 placements revised accordingly.

C-005.scope: MCP write path only (user decision); provider-default + config_set deferred to C-005b

C-005b.scope: provider-default -> store + HTTP route tests + MockKernelBuilder temp-storage isolation; generic config_set deferred to C-005c

C-005c.note: generic config_set store migration: needs a kernel config-override merge layer applied at load/reload + security review for section-wholesale writes

C-007.note: single-row array + render_mcp_summary sort already guarantee prompt determinism; added config_store list() ORDER BY guard test

C-008.note: import CLI (merged in PR #74). NOTE: C-009 found+fixed a data-loss bug here — the import wrote source=bootstrap; now source=runtime so prod values survive the ConfigMap revert. Deploy the fixed image BEFORE running the prod import.

C-009.note: manifest revert (read-only ConfigMap subPath mount, init-config removed) + a first C-008 source=runtime fix. Import logic superseded by C-009b. PR #75 merged.

C-009b.note: Found during live deploy: merged C-009 import used seed semantics (Unchanged no-op) so it would NOT convert the daemon's boot-seeded BOOTSTRAP rows to runtime -> the revert would still wipe prod. Fixed: import now promote_or_seed (preserves store value, forces runtime, promotes bootstrap rows). Deploy this image BEFORE running the import.

C-005d.note: Migrate memory + channels settings to the DB store. Reuse C-005c config_overrides + a trusted-section apply path; secret VALUES stay out of the DB. PR #88 (feat/memory-channels-to-store) carries C-005d.1 + C-005d.2; rebased onto post-upstream-merge main (after #87). Sub-changes: C-005d.1 (DONE), C-005d.2 (DONE), C-005d.3 (PENDING).

C-005d.1.note: Trusted-section apply path: TRUSTED_SECTION_KEYS + OR-gate in resolve_config_with_overrides; removed budget from is_writable_config_path EXACT (only the typed budget handler writes budget now). PR #85 (runtime clippy fix) merged; rebased onto main after upstream merge #87.

C-005d.2.note: memory_config_patch_surreal: builds memory + proactive_memory from LIVE config (PATCHes accumulate), stores both as trusted-section overrides, resolve+validate+replace_config; config.toml untouched under surreal. ALSO fixed json_to_toml_edit_value to omit JSON-null object keys (Option::None round-trip) — was breaking embedding_dimensions="". No secret VALUE in store (embedding_api_key_env is an env-var pointer).

C-005d.3.note: sidecar_channels handler -> store; channel env-file split unchanged; include-shadow guard preserved

deploy_state: image bdf5fc802 (pre-C-009b) running on GKE; C-009 manifest NOT applied (init-config still present). Cutover blocked until the C-009b image is deployed.
k8s_revert_gated_on: C-009b image deployed + C-008 import run/verified on prod PVC
